_intent: Phase 2 NVENC shootout. Adds the rate-anchored VBR regime that the CQ-only NvencKnobSweep matrix missed (rate-anchored will not balloon on already-compressed sources where CQ32 over-allocates). Plus an anime-tuned variant (lower CQ for the simpler-content win, long GOP, tune=hq instead of uhq). Sources extended with two low-bitrate live-action 1080p episodes (Outlander 1438 kbps, Call the Midwife 999 kbps) so the rate-anchored advantage is visible. Production reference (nv_cq32_sink) kept for direct comparison against the new variants.
